title: Ping Wheel - Portal 2 Sound
description: Replaces the default Ping Wheel sound with the one from Portal 2
body:
Ping Wheel - Portal 2 Sound

Replaces the default Ping Wheel sound with the one from Portal 2

This resource pack replaces the default sound in **LukenSkyne’s [Ping Wheel](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel)** mod with the familiar ping sound from **Portal 2 Co-op Mode**. --- ### **Supported Mods** - [Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel) ### **Preview** You can hear the original sound used in Portal 2 here (skip to **1:40**): ### **Compatibility** This pack has been tested on **Minecraft 1.21.1**, but due to the structure of the mod’s assets, it should also work with earlier versions of the Ping Wheel mod. ### **License/Source** This pack is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. The audio file used is `ui/beepclear.wav`, sourced from [sourcesounds/portal2](https://github.com/sourcesounds/portal2). It is utilized under **fair use** for non-commercial, transformative purposes. ---
